label: 1561 CE
era_summary: Year 1561 (MDLXI) was a common year starting on Wednesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1561: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain, Venice-Turkey, Tripoli, 1559-65. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
